titles.title: I Wouldn't Take Nothing for My Journey

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well, I started out travelling for the Lord many years ago I had a lot of hearthaches, Had a lot of grief and woe When I stumble,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: then I would humble down And I can say, "Thank you, Lord, for my journey I wouldn't take nothing for my journey now."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well, I wouldn't take nothing for my journey now I'm gonna make it to heaven somehow Though the devil tempts me and tries to turn me around He's offered everything that's got a name All the wealth I want and worldly fame If I could still, I wouldn't take nothing For my journey now.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's nothing in this world that could ever take the place of God's Love All the silver and gold could never buy a touch from above

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When my soul needs healing and I begin to feel His power I can say thank you lord I wouldn't take nothing for my journey now
